Action required: confirm your account before tomorrow

From: Security Notice <security@paypa1.example>
To: you@example.com
Sent: today, 9:42 AM

Hi there,

We noticed a sign-in attempt from a new device. To keep your account secure, please confirm it within 24 hours by clicking verify your account here.

If you didn't try to sign in, you can reset your password from your dashboard.

For reference, here is the link to our support center on GitHub and our phishing FAQ.

You can also see our updated policy at our security site or check the announcement on our latest update page.

Thanks,
The Security Team

© Synthetic Demo Inc. · This is a test fixture for Gorgon Eye.

Aegis fixture · expected verdicts: paypa1.example phishing · example.com/r?to=... suspicious · 10.0.0.1 phishing · invoice.zip suspicious · github.com safe · en.wikipedia.org safe.
